prompt: Create a high-resolution cinematic VFX asset of a brilliant electric blue-white lens flare on a pure black background. The composition is centered slightly left of frame with an intensely overexposed white core, surrounded by radiant blue glow. A razor-straight horizontal light streak spans edge to edge across the image, intersected by a vertical beam through the center to form a luminous cross. Add many thin radial starburst rays shooting outward from the core, with soft volumetric bloom, subtle blue haze, and faint circular lens artifacts around the center. Include exactly 4 small secondary flare orbs along the horizontal beam: 1 tiny dim orb to the left of the core and 3 brighter blue-white orbs to the right. Keep the background completely black with no text, no objects, no borders, and no visible texture, designed as a transparent-feeling game/anime effect material even though rendered on black. Use a wide 16:9 frame, sharp highlights, realistic optical flare physics, high contrast, glossy sci-fi energy, and clean compositing-ready edges.
